edit_summary: Round-1 fixes: AC-003/AC-005 rewritten as one-directional invariant against the real 5-state Audit-Status machine (B-1 Major); TEST-005 gains SHA-256 before/after immutability assertion on the two real WFI files and absent-Audit-Attempt=0 semantics (B-2); bootstrap-complete tasks.md defined in Field Definitions with template citations (B-3); uncited line-count claims dropped from REQ-003/REQ-004 (A-1); AC-014 cross-reference disambiguated to sdd-domain's own AC-014 at specs/sdd-domain/requirements.md:120 (A-2).
